---
title: "Boosting"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## load libraries 

```{r}
library(bigsnpr)
library(data.table)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)
library(readr)
library(pgenlibr)
library(tidyr)
library(dataPreparation)
library(Rfast)
library(R.utils)
```

## 2. Set trait and base path

```{r}
trait <- "BMI"
forostar <- FALSE

base_path <- if (forostar) {
  "/net/ifs2/san_projekte/projekte/Doktoranden"
} else {
  "R:/Doktoranden"
}
```

## 2. File definitions
```{r}
trait_info <- list(
  BMI = list(
    file = file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/daten/data/PV0857_D00074_NODUP.xlsx"),
    id_col = "SIC",
    pheno_col = "BMI_BMI"
  )
)

info <- trait_info[[trait]]
pheno_raw <- read_excel(info$file)

pheno <- pheno_raw %>%
  select(IID = all_of(info$id_col), Phenotype = all_of(info$pheno_col)) %>%
  mutate(Phenotype = as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", Phenotype)))
```

## 3. Combine with metadata

```{r}
meta <- read_excel(file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/daten/data/PV0857_D00153_NODUP.xlsx"))

map <- read_excel(file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/daten/data/PV0857_D00126.xlsx")) %>%
  select(SIC = ENTNAHME_SIC, IID = ENTNAHME_SAMPLING_ID)

# remove dublicates in map and join with pheno
map_dedup <- map %>%
  distinct(SIC, .keep_all = TRUE)
meta_clean <- meta %>%
  left_join(map, by = "SIC") %>%
  select(IID = SIC, Sex = ADULT_PROB_GENDER, Age = ADULT_PROB_AGE) %>%
  mutate(
    Age = as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", Age)),
    Sex = factor(Sex, levels = c(1, 2), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
  )

covariate_data <- pheno %>%
  left_join(meta_clean, by = "IID") %>%
  select(IID, Sex, Age, Phenotype) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Sex), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Phenotype))

pheno_mapped <- covariate_data %>%
  rename(SIC = IID) %>%
  left_join(map_dedup, by = "SIC") %>%
  select(IID, Sex, Age, Phenotype)

head(pheno_mapped)
```

## 4. Create train/val/test split
```{r}
set.seed(42)
n <- nrow(pheno_mapped)
idx <- sample(n)
train_idx <- idx[1:round(0.6 * n)]
val_idx   <- idx[(round(0.6 * n) + 1):(round(0.8 * n))]
test_idx  <- idx[(round(0.8 * n) + 1):n]
```

```{r}
pheno_mapped$Sex <- relevel(pheno_mapped$Sex, ref = "Male")

X <- model.matrix(~ Age + Sex, data = pheno_mapped)
y <- pheno_mapped$Phenotype

X_train <- X[train_idx, ]
y_train <- y[train_idx]

X_val <- X[val_idx, ]
y_val <- y[val_idx]

X_test <- X[test_idx, ]
y_test <- y[test_idx]

G_index_train <- matched_indices[train_idx]
G_index_val   <- matched_indices[val_idx]
G_index_test  <- matched_indices[test_idx]
```

```{r}
pheno_mapped$split <- NA_character_  # create empty column
pheno_mapped <- pheno_mapped %>%
  mutate(FID = IID)

# Standardize the BMI phenotype
pheno_mapped <- pheno_mapped %>%
  mutate(
    BMI_std = as.numeric(scale(Phenotype))  # Standardized phenotype column
  ) %>%
  select(FID, IID, Age, Sex, Phenotype, BMI_std, split)

pheno_mapped$split[train_idx] <- "train"
pheno_mapped$split[val_idx]   <- "val"
pheno_mapped$split[test_idx]  <- "test"
pheno_mapped
```
```{r}
write_tsv(pheno_mapped, file = file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/BMI_input.tsv"))
```

## 5. Set file paths for other functions
```{r}
source(file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/snpboost.R"))
source(file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/functions_snpboost.R"))
source(file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/functions_snpnet.R"))
source(file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/lm_boost.R"))
```

## 6. Fit snpboost model (adjust data paths and make sure to download plink2 and zdstcat)
```{r}
prs_model <- snpboost(
  genotype.pfile = file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/LIFE-Adult_TOPMed_strict_qc"),
  phenotype.file = file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/BMI_input.tsv"),
  phenotype = "Phenotype",
  covariates = c("Age", "Sex"),
  split.col = "split",
  family = "gaussian",          # for continuous trait
  metric = "MSEP",
  p_batch = 1000,
  m_batch = 1000,
  b_stop = 1,
  sl = 0.01,                      # learning rate
  configs = list(
    plink2.path = "C:/Users/mar5862fre/Downloads/plink2_win64_20251026/plink2.exe",
    zstdcat.path = "C:/Users/mar5862fre/Downloads/plink2_win64_20251026/zstdcat.exe",
    nCores = parallel::detectCores() - 1,
    results.dir = file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/snpboost_results"),
    meta.dir = "meta",
    save.dir = "results",
    save = TRUE,
    save.computeProduct = TRUE
  )
)
```
# look at model
```{r}
str(prs_model, max.level = 1)
```
```{r}
betas_final <- get_coefficients(
  coeff_path = prs_model$beta,
  index = which.min(prs_model$metric.val),                 # or last iteration
  covariates = prs_model$configs[['covariates']]
)
print(betas_final)
```
```{r}
# Convert betas to a data frame
beta_df <- data.frame(
  Predictor = names(betas_final),
  Beta = as.numeric(betas_final),
  row.names = NULL
)

# Write TSV
write.table(
  beta_df,
  file = "strictqc_betas.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE
)
```



# Predict test scores 
```{r}
# 1) Paths & names
genotype.pfile <- file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/LIFE-Adult_TOPMed_strict_qc")
phenotype.file <- file.path(base_path, "MarieFreudenberg/analysen/Boosting/BMI_input.tsv")
phenotype      <- "Phenotype"          # column name in the TSV
subset_name    <- "test"               # matches values in configs[['split.col']] (e.g., 'train_test')

# 2) Predict PRS-only and PRS+covariates on TEST using your helper
pred_test <- predict_snpboost(
  fit               = prs_model,
  new_genotype_file = genotype.pfile,
  new_phenotype_file= phenotype.file,
  phenotype         = phenotype,
  subset            = subset_name
)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# 1) Predict on ALL samples (needed for GLM refits) + on TEST (optional)
pred_all <- predict_snpboost(
  fit                = prs_model,
  new_genotype_file  = genotype.pfile,
  new_phenotype_file = phenotype.file,
  phenotype          = phenotype
)

pred_test <- predict_snpboost(
  fit                = prs_model,
  new_genotype_file  = genotype.pfile,
  new_phenotype_file = phenotype.file,
  phenotype          = phenotype,
  subset             = subset_name
)

# 2) Build a clean data.table with phenotype, PRS, covariates, and split
cfg       <- prs_model$configs
split_col <- cfg[['split.col']]
covars    <- cfg[['covariates']]

phe <- fread(phenotype.file)
phe[, IID := as.character(IID)]

# Grab PRS from pred_all (named vector) and merge
prs_dt <- data.table(IID = names(pred_all$PRS), PRS = as.numeric(pred_all$PRS))
dat <- merge(phe, prs_dt, by = "IID", all.x = TRUE)

# Recode Sex like in training (Female=1, Male=0) if needed
if ("Sex" %in% names(dat) && is.character(dat$Sex)) {
  dat[, Sex := ifelse(Sex == "Female", 1, 0)]
}

# If any PRS missing (e.g., no matching variants), set to 0 so rows aren’t dropped
dat[is.na(PRS), PRS := 0]

# Keep rows with phenotype and defined split
dat <- dat[!is.na(get(phenotype)) & !is.na(get(split_col))]

train_val <- dat[get(split_col) %in% c("train","val")]
test      <- dat[get(split_col) == subset_name]

# Helpers
rmse <- function(y, yhat) sqrt(mean((y - yhat)^2))
r2   <- function(y, yhat) if (length(yhat) > 1) cor(y, yhat)^2 else NA_real_

# 3) Refit three GLMs on train+val and evaluate on test

## (a) PRS-only
lm_prs <- lm(reformulate(termlabels = "scale(PRS)", response = phenotype), data = train_val)
pred_prs <- predict(lm_prs, newdata = test)
rmse_prs <- rmse(test[[phenotype]], pred_prs)
r2_prs   <- r2(test[[phenotype]], pred_prs)

## (b) Covariates-only
if (length(covars) > 0) {
  f_cov <- reformulate(termlabels = covars, response = phenotype)  # phenotype ~ covars
} else {
  f_cov <- as.formula(paste0(phenotype, " ~ 1"))                    # intercept-only fallback
}
lm_cov <- lm(f_cov, data = train_val)
pred_cov <- predict(lm_cov, newdata = test)
rmse_cov <- rmse(test[[phenotype]], pred_cov)
r2_cov   <- r2(test[[phenotype]], pred_cov)

## (c) Full: PRS + covariates
if (length(covars) > 0) {
  f_full <- as.formula(paste0(phenotype, " ~ scale(PRS) + ", paste(covars, collapse = " + ")))
} else {
  f_full <- as.formula(paste0(phenotype, " ~ scale(PRS)"))
}
lm_full <- lm(f_full, data = train_val)
pred_full <- predict(lm_full, newdata = test)
rmse_full <- rmse(test[[phenotype]], pred_full)
r2_full   <- r2(test[[phenotype]], pred_full)

# 4) Report
res_tab <- data.frame(
  Model = c("PRS only", "Covariates only", "PRS + Covariates"),
  RMSE  = c(rmse_prs, rmse_cov, rmse_full),
  R2    = c(r2_prs, r2_cov, r2_full)
)
print(res_tab, row.names = FALSE)

# 5) Plot: Measured vs Predicted (full model)
p <- ggplot(data.frame(y = test[[phenotype]], yhat = pred_full), aes(x = yhat, y = y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "firebrick") +
  labs(title = "Predicted vs Measured BMI (Full Model)",
       x = "Predicted BMI", y = "Measured BMI") +
  annotate("text",
           x = min(pred_full, na.rm = TRUE),
           y = max(test[[phenotype]], na.rm = TRUE),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
           label = sprintf("RMSE = %.3f\nR² = %.4f", rmse_full, r2_full))
print(p)

```

```{r}
predict_snpboost <- function(
  fit,
  new_genotype_file,         # PLINK2 pfile prefix (no extension)
  new_phenotype_file,        # TSV with IID, phenotype, covariates, split.col
  phenotype,                 # column name of phenotype in TSV
  subset = NULL,             # e.g. "test" (value in fit$configs[['split.col']])
  idx = NULL,                # optional: index of best iteration; else auto-picked
  out_prefix = "PRS",        # basename for plink --out in results.dir
  return_all = TRUE          # return merged eval table
){
  require(data.table)
  `%||%` <- function(a,b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

  # ---- 0) configs & paths ----
  cfg <- fit$configs
  stopifnot(!is.null(cfg[['plink2.path']]))
  results.dir <- cfg[['results.dir']] %||% tempdir(check = TRUE)
  dir.create(results.dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  # ---- 1) choose model index ----
  if (is.null(idx)) {
    idx <- if (!is.null(fit$metric.val)) which.min(fit$metric.val) else which.min(fit$metric.train)
  }

  # ---- 2) collect coefficients at idx ----
  # names: (Intercept), covariates..., SNP names...
  betas <- get_coefficients(fit$beta, index = idx, covariates = cfg[['covariates']])
  # separate
  beta0 <- unname(betas[["(Intercept)"]])
  covars <- cfg[['covariates']] %||% character(0)
  beta_cov <- if (length(covars)) betas[covars] else numeric(0)
  beta_snps <- betas[setdiff(names(betas), c("(Intercept)", covars))]

  # short-circuit: if no SNPs selected, still predict (intercept + covariates only)
  if (length(beta_snps) == 0L) {
    phe <- fread(new_phenotype_file)
    if (!is.null(subset)) phe <- phe[phe[[cfg[['split.col']]]] == subset, ]
    # optional Sex recode for consistency
    if ("Sex" %in% covars && is.character(phe$Sex)) {
      phe[, Sex := ifelse(Sex == "Female", 1, 0)]
    }
    Xcov <- if (length(covars)) as.matrix(phe[, ..covars]) else matrix(0, nrow(phe), 0)
    pred <- as.numeric(beta0 + if (length(covars)) Xcov %*% beta_cov else 0)
    resid <- phe[[phenotype]] - pred
    mse   <- mean((resid)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
    out <- list(
      idx = idx,
      betas = betas,
      PRS = setNames(rep(0, nrow(phe)), phe$IID),
      prediction = matrix(pred, ncol = 1, dimnames = list(phe$IID, "pred")),
      residuals = matrix(resid, ncol = 1, dimnames = list(phe$IID, "resid")),
      metric = mse,
      RMSE = sqrt(mse),
      R2 = cor(phe[[phenotype]], pred)^2,
      eval = if (return_all) data.table(IID = phe$IID, y = phe[[phenotype]], pred = pred, PRS = 0) else NULL
    )
    return(out)
  }

  # ---- 3) build PLINK score file (ID, ALLELE, BETA) ----
  # Your SNP names look like "chr13:33921449:C:T_T". Often the last underscore suffix is the effect allele.
  split_last_underscore <- function(s) {
    p <- regexpr("_(?!.*_)", s, perl = TRUE)  # last "_"
    if (p[1] == -1) return(c(s, ""))          # no underscore
    c(substr(s, 1, p[1]-1), substr(s, p[1]+1, nchar(s)))
  }
  # Use your split_last() if it exists
  if (exists("split_last")) splitter <- split_last else splitter <- function(x, pattern="_") split_last_underscore(x)

  var_names <- names(beta_snps)
  split_mat <- t(vapply(var_names, function(v) splitter(v, "_"), FUN.VALUE = c("", "")))
  score_df  <- data.table(ID = split_mat[,1],
                          ALLELE = split_mat[,2],
                          BETA = as.numeric(beta_snps))
  score_path <- file.path(results.dir, paste0(out_prefix, "_scorefile.txt"))
  fwrite(score_df, score_path, sep = "\t", col.names = TRUE)

  # ---- 4) run plink2 --score ----
  sscore_prefix <- file.path(results.dir, out_prefix)
  cmd <- paste(
    shQuote(cfg[['plink2.path']]),
    "--threads", cfg[['nCores']] %||% 1,
    "--pfile", shQuote(new_genotype_file),
    if (isTRUE(cfg[['vzs']])) "vzs" else "",
    "--score", shQuote(score_path), 1, 2, 3, "header",
    "cols=maybefid,denom,dosagesum,scoreavgs,scoresums",
    "--out", shQuote(sscore_prefix)
  )
  cat("PLINK2 --score:\n", cmd, "\n")
  system(cmd, intern = FALSE, wait = TRUE)

  # read PRS
  sscore_file <- paste0(sscore_prefix, ".sscore")
  stopifnot(file.exists(sscore_file))
  sscore <- fread(sscore_file)
  # plink names can vary; SCORE1_SUM is typical:
  prs_col <- intersect(colnames(sscore), c("SCORE1_SUM", "SCORE_AVG", "SCORE1_AVG", "SCORE_SUM"))
  stopifnot(length(prs_col) >= 1)
  setnames(sscore, prs_col[1], "PRS")
  # keep IID
  if (!"IID" %in% names(sscore) && "IID" %in% names(sscore[, .(IID = as.character(IID))])) {
    # noop; defensive
  }
  prs_dt <- sscore[, .(IID = as.character(IID), PRS = as.numeric(PRS))]

  # ---- 5) join phenotype & covariates; compute final predictions ----
  phe <- fread(new_phenotype_file)
  phe[, IID := as.character(IID)]
  if (!is.null(subset)) phe <- phe[phe[[cfg[['split.col']]]] == subset, ]
  dat <- merge(phe, prs_dt, by = "IID", all.x = TRUE)

  # convert Sex string to numeric like in training (Female = 1, Male = 0)
  if ("Sex" %in% covars && is.character(dat$Sex)) {
    dat[, Sex := ifelse(Sex == "Female", 1, 0)]
  }

  # any missing PRS -> 0 (e.g., monomorphic or no matching variants)
  dat[is.na(PRS), PRS := 0]

  Xcov <- if (length(covars)) as.matrix(dat[, ..covars]) else matrix(0, nrow(dat), 0)
  pred <- as.numeric(beta0 + dat$PRS + if (length(covars)) Xcov %*% beta_cov else 0)

  # ---- 6) metrics on provided subset ----
  stopifnot(phenotype %in% names(dat))
  y   <- dat[[phenotype]]
  ok  <- is.finite(y) & is.finite(pred)
  mse <- mean((y[ok] - pred[ok])^2)
  rmse <- sqrt(mse)
  r2   <- if (sum(ok) > 1) cor(y[ok], pred[ok])^2 else NA_real_

  # ---- 7) outputs ----
  out <- list(
    idx = idx,
    betas = betas,
    PRS = setNames(dat$PRS, dat$IID),
    prediction = matrix(pred, ncol = 1, dimnames = list(dat$IID, "pred")),
    residuals = matrix(y - pred, ncol = 1, dimnames = list(dat$IID, "resid")),
    metric = mse,            # MSE
    RMSE = rmse,
    R2 = r2,
    eval = if (return_all) data.table(IID = dat$IID, y = y, pred = pred, PRS = dat$PRS) else NULL,
    scorefile = score_path,
    sscore = sscore_file
  )
  return(out)
}

```
